material.title:
US Joint Interagency Task Force 401 Contract 2
										
                                            pages 344.5KB

analysis.what_happened: DroneShield secured a $24.9M contract (A$19.3M initial value + A$5.6M options) with the US Department of War's Joint Interagency Task Force 401 to supply mobile and fixed-site counter-drone hardware, subscriptions, and services.
analysis.so_what: At least A$10M is expected as committed FY2026 revenue with the balance in FY2027, providing near-term revenue visibility; the contract also requires DroneShield to procure third-party components, which will compress margins on this deal.
